title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa 2
tmdbOverview: When strangers Reet and Ruhan cross paths, their journey leads to an abandoned mansion and a dreaded spirit who has been trapped for eighteen years.
synopsis: Bhool Bhulaiyaa 2 (2022) is a horror and comedy film from India. It has a 5.7 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a UA certification (IN rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
